# Innovations


## [Arc Marine](https://uplink.weforum.org/uplink/s/uplink-contribution/a012o00001OSlRQAA1/arc-marine-reef-cubes-the-building-blocks-for-the-ocean)

Low carbon reef creation: [Reef cubes](https://arcmarine.co.uk/product/reef-cubes/)

## Biorock Technology
Uses low voltage currents to accelerate the growth of limestone.

## [SharkSafe Barrier](https://www.sharksafesolution.com)
